hero.subtitle: The ultimate training program for athletes and training centers. 5 categories. Smart progression. Personalized adaptation.

categories.title: 5 CATEGORIES OF
categories.subtitle: Develop all areas of your fitness with our progressive level system

speed.name: SPEED

speed.description: Develop explosive power and lightning-fast reactions. Sprint drills, agility work, and plyometrics designed to maximize your velocity.

strength.name: STRENGTH
strength.subtitle: Power
strength.description: Build functional strength that translates to real performance. Progressive overload, compound movements, and sport-specific power.

endurance.name: ENDURANCE
endurance.subtitle: Stamina
endurance.description: Push your cardiovascular limits and muscular endurance. Zone training, interval work, and sustainable performance enhancement.

gymnastics.name: GYMNASTICS
gymnastics.subtitle: Skill
gymnastics.description: Master body control and technical skills. Coordination drills, skill progressions, and movement mastery for complete athleticism.

mobility.name: MOBILITY
mobility.subtitle: Flexibility
mobility.description: Unlock your full range of motion. Dynamic stretching, joint health, and flexibility work to prevent injury and optimize performance.

anywhere.title: TRAIN ANYWHERE
anywhere.description: Train at gyms, sports centers, parks, or from home. Programs adapt to your available equipment and location.

smart.title: SMART PROGRESS
